description: Composition Black boyleg style swimsuit made of 82% polyamide and 18% elastane with crossback double shoulder straps, has woven tape detailing on the front in contrasting colours and elasticated leg bands Fit Regular Wash care Hand wash in cold water Use mild detergent Line dry inside out in shade Cool iron This swim suit for women from nabaiji designed for recreational swimmers, is made of equarea - a water repellent technology to keep you dry while you relax in the water. Made of a polyester and elastane mix fabric, it helps you move with ease, while protecting your skin from the effects of pool water.
